name: WNZN Power - Event Ticket Confirmation & Reminder Flow

metadata.notes: Webhook fired by ticketing platform (Eventbrite, Stripe, etc.) on purchase

mapper.subject: You're in! — {{1.event_name}} Ticket Confirmation
mapper.body:
{{1.firstname}},

Your ticket is confirmed. We can't wait to see you.

Event: {{1.event_name}}
Date: {{formatDate(1.event_date; 'dddd, MMMM D, YYYY')}}
Time: {{1.event_time}}
Location: {{1.event_location}}
Ticket: #{{1.ticket_number}}

Please bring this email (printed or on your phone) as your ticket. Doors open 30 minutes before start time.

If you have any questions, reply to this email or call us at {{1.venue_phone}}.

Thank you for supporting WNZN Power and the P.A.C.E. Foundation. Events like this are possible because of people like you.

See you there,
Dr. Mark A. Ballard, Sr.
WNZN Power 89.1 FM | Lorain, Ohio

mapper.text: 🎟️ *Ticket Sold* — {{1.firstname}} {{1.lastname}} purchased a ticket to {{1.event_name}}. Confirmation sent. Added to Mailchimp + HubSpot.

metadata.notes: Wait until 7 days before event (calculated from purchase — adjust based on event date logic)

mapper.subject: One Week Away — {{1.event_name}} | WNZN Power
mapper.body:
{{1.firstname}},

One week from today, we're gathering for {{1.event_name}} — and your seat is reserved.

Quick reminder:
📅 {{formatDate(1.event_date; 'dddd, MMMM D, YYYY')}}
🕐 {{1.event_time}}
📍 {{1.event_location}}

Bring a friend if you haven't already — this is the kind of night worth sharing.

We'll see you there.
WNZN Power 89.1 FM

mapper.subject: Tomorrow Night — {{1.event_name}} | Doors Open at {{1.doors_open_time}}
mapper.body:
{{1.firstname}},

Tomorrow's the night.

Here's everything you need to know:

📅 {{formatDate(1.event_date; 'MMMM D, YYYY')}}
🚪 Doors open: {{1.doors_open_time}}
🕐 Show starts: {{1.event_time}}
📍 Location: {{1.event_location}}
🎟️ Your ticket: #{{1.ticket_number}}

Bring this email (on your phone is fine) to check in at the door.

We'll see you tomorrow night. Come ready to be blessed.
WNZN Power 89.1 FM

mapper.subject: Thank You for Being There — {{1.event_name}}
mapper.body:
{{1.firstname}},

Thank you for joining us at {{1.event_name}}.

Nights like that happen because people like you choose to show up — and that means something to us. The P.A.C.E. Foundation exists to serve this community, and your presence is a reminder of why we do what we do.

If you'd like to go deeper with what we're building at WNZN Power 89.1 FM, here are a few ways to stay connected:

  • Listen live: WNZN.org
  • Support our mission: WNZN.org/donate
  • Follow us: Facebook and Instagram @WNZNPower

We hope to see you at the next one. Stay tuned — more is coming.

With gratitude,
Dr. Mark A. Ballard, Sr.
Founder & CEO, P.A.C.E. Foundation
WNZN Power 89.1 FM | Lorain, Ohio
